title: Full Committee Hearing: Speed to Scale: Revitalizing the Defense Industrial Base
description: The committee will receive testimony from Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment Michael P. Duffey regarding efforts to revitalize the Defense Industrial Base.
text:
The committee will receive testimony from Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment Michael P. Duffey regarding efforts to revitalize the Defense Industrial Base.
Opening Statement:
Chairman Mike Rogers
Witness & Testimony:
The Honorable Michael P. Duffey
Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment
Office of the Secretary of Defense
